---
title: "Documentation"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
description: "Technical documentation, guides, and references for chen.ist services and tools."
from: markdown+raw_html
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Technical <span class="gr">Documentation</span></h1>
    <p>Guides, references, and resources to help you implement and maintain our solutions.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Documentation</h2>
    <p class="sub">Comprehensive resources organized by topic.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/resources/guides/security/implementation-guide.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Security"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Security Implementation Guide</h3><p>Implementing and maintaining security solutions in your environment.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/resources/guides/cloud/migration-handbook.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Cloud"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Cloud Migration Handbook</h3><p>Step-by-step instructions for migrating your infrastructure to the cloud.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/resources/guides/api/endpoints.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="API"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>API Reference</h3><p>Comprehensive API documentation for developers and integrators.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>More resources</h2>
    <p class="sub">Tools, templates, and keynotes from our team.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-tools"></i><h3>Interactive Tools</h3><p>Security assessments, calculators, and utilities.</p><a href="/resources/tools/" class="m-lk">Browse tools</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i><h3>Templates</h3><p>Security policies, risk assessments, and compliance documents.</p><a href="/resources/templates/" class="m-lk">Browse templates</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-easel"></i><h3>Keynotes</h3><p>Presentations on security, cloud, and digital transformation.</p><a href="/resources/keynotes/zero-trust-security/" class="m-lk">View keynotes</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Need help?</h2>
    <p>Our team is ready to assist with implementation questions and technical challenges.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b">Book a consultation</a>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
